author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 9 mega-swarm. Dispatching everything in parallel by file independence. P0: CubeCL integration + WGPU backend + ROCm backend. P1: ferrotorch-train (Learner/Metrics/TUI), operation fusion, LLM modules (RoPE/SwiGLU/KV cache/Transformer blocks), quantization. P2: gradient accumulation, more activations/losses, Muon optimizer. Maximum parallelism.
